item.title: Key contracts awarded for Indonesia offshore gas project
item.description: Production start-up from Conrad Energy Asia’s Mako field on track for fourth quarter of 2027

item.title: Fresh delays at Qatar expansion megaproject amid Iran war uncertainty
item.description: Offshore logistics and procurement have been disrupted at the Strait of Hormuz, a vital shipping chokepoint, impacting regional EPCI projects

item.title: Woodside reaches settlement with Greenpeace
item.description: Parties agree to drop greenwashing court proceedings

item.title: Operator capitalising on favourable pricing in the rig market
item.description: Valeura Energy snaps up jack-up on long-term deal

item.title: UK independent eyes new suitors
item.description: Takeover bid by Viaro Energy was shelved at beginning of April

item.title: Russia to pause Kazakh oil flows to Germany
item.description: Astana says halt to transit flows due to Ukraine drone strikes on Russian energy infrastructure

item.title: Oil futures misrepresenting scale of Iran supply shock for global markets, say leading traders
item.description: Historical disconnect building between soaring physical prices and financial markets

item.title: Weatherford sees light on horizon after revenues drop
item.description: Shutdowns in the Middle East sank Weatherford's quarterly earnings but the company is preparing for a post-war rebound

item.title: Saipem eyes Middle East repairs amid positive outlook
item.description: Italian contracting giant maintains outlook unchanged on hope of quick resolution of Middle East crisis, assures business is resilent

item.title: Shell captures vast reconnaissance licence offshore Sierra Leone
item.description: Exploration deal allows supermajor to carry out geological and geophysical studies across 19 blocks

item.title: US Gulf operator ties up two drillships
item.description: LLOG signs contracts with deepwater drilling company for use of two drillships

item.title: UK reveals details of new licensing regime
item.description: Plans for Transitional Energy Certificates were announced in last year's Autumn budget

item.title: Traders warn gas prices need to rise further to balance market
item.description: Asia demand destruction is insufficient but also unsustainable, while consumers will reassess viability of long-term LNG reliance

item.title: Vaar vrooms up to Norway's number two producer in first quarter
item.description: New projects coming on stream have driven Vaar's production increase

item.title: Indian state behemoth weighs $1.17 billion investment offshore Brazil
item.description: Indian government evaluating proposal from OVL for Petrobras' SEAP-II project

item.title: UK independent advances Middle East acquisitions
item.description: Kistos clarifies that production exported from its Oman acquisition targets bypasses the Strait of Hormuz

item.title: Billion-barrel prospect set to be drilled onshore Namibia in 2027
item.description: Monitor Exploration bullish on Owambo basin after data integration exercise and results from ReconAfrica discovery in same play

item.title: Appraisal well under way on large Norwegian discovery
item.description: The Carmen discovery was made in July 2023

item.title: Appraisal well underway on large Norwegian discovery
item.description: The Carmen discovery was made in July 2023

item.title: Dutch contractor reaches milestone on large Norway projects
item.description: Platform jackets completed with topsides to come

item.title: Trump extends Iran ceasefire until discussions conclude, blockade to continue
item.description: Two-week cessation of hostilities announced on 8 April was due to expire on Wednesday

item.title: Is shale a potential frontier for Australian's gas future?
item.description: Developers hoping Australia's Beetaloo basin will help meet increasing domestic demand and sustain country's LNG export projects

item.title: Is shale a potential frontier for Australia's gas future?
item.description: Developers hoping Australia's Beetaloo basin will help meet increasing domestic demand and sustain country's LNG export projects

item.title: Myanmar signs deal with Chinese operator to increase oil production
item.description: Chinese player will carry out improved petroleum recovery at the Htaukshapin-Kanni oilfield

item.title: War risk insurance costs surge for Middle East offshore projects
item.description: Disruption to Strait of Hormuz severely impacting procurement and logistics for several offshore projects in region

item.title: Singapore player to decide FPSO winner for Vietnam gas project
item.description: Jadestone expects to award floater prize in the second half of 2026

item.title: Saipem gets to SURF with ExxonMobil's latest Guyana project
item.description: US supermajor gives go-ahead to Italian contractor for subsea engineering work at Longtail

item.title: Saipem sees earnings growth as Strait of Hormuz closure clouds future
item.description: Contractor says waterway’s chokehold ‘could impact the delivery of certain components which are critical to Saipem’s projects globally’

item.title: Iran reiterates interest in securing Russian pipeline gas - report
item.description: Tehran reaffirms desire to import gas via Azerbaijan with no end seen in its ongoing conflict with the US and Israel

item.title: South Korean player scoops Africa LNG prize
item.description: GasEntec will deliver regas unit to Senegal’s second import facility
